generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control actuators configured via TwinLight framework for occupancy-based and reinforcement learning-driven adjustments to lighting levels and energy consumption"
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system valves controlled through Ditto middleware for environmental regulation based on real-time sensor data and predictive maintenance algorithms"
]

instance HVACFanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system fans with adaptive control capabilities integrated with BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework for energy-efficient operation"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning controller that dynamically adjusts operational parameters (lighting, HVAC) using iterative optimization algorithms and real-time sensor feedback"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyPIRSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Passive Infrared (PIR) occupancy sensor deployed for adaptive lighting control and energy optimization within building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance ThermalCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal imaging camera sensor for occupancy detection and indoor air quality monitoring through thermal pattern analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor integrated with HVAC system for real-time monitoring and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor providing real-time indoor air quality metrics for HVAC control and occupant comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Carbon dioxide sensor monitoring indoor air quality levels for ventilation system optimization and occupant health"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption meter tracking electrical usage across building zones for demand response and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyPIRSensor, ThermalCameraSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components and their relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device configurations including tenant IDs, endpoint addresses, control policies, and sensor schemas extracted from BIM during deployment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, TwinLightFramework
]

instance PhysicsBasedSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded thermal and lighting physics-based simulations for predictive analytics and what-if scenario testing within the DT"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISFramework, UnrealEngine5
]

instance HistoricalTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Scalable time-series dataset containing energy usage patterns, occupancy trends, and environmental metrics for trend analysis and machine learning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance VisualizationAssets : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets including 3D models, interactive dashboards, and immersive monitoring interfaces for stakeholder visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StakeholderDashboardService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware providing standardized data ingestion, normalization, and real-time synchronization between physical sensors and virtual twin via MQTT/HTTP protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime middleware enabling bidirectional communication, tenant management, and closed-loop control between physical actuators and virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, OccupancyBasedRecommendationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine providing interactive, immersive dashboards for real-time monitoring and stakeholder engagement"
    DTDFVocab:enables StakeholderDashboardService
]

instance BOREALISFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework enabling adaptive control policies and energy optimization through iterative learning from operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, ReinforcementLearningControlService
]

instance TwinLightFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework for automated generation of runtime interfaces and control configurations from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of operational metrics including energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionTrendInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting anomalies in sensor data and HVAC systems through machine learning models trained on historical operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionAlertAction, MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing real-time consumption trends to identify energy savings potential (15-20%) through adaptive lighting and HVAC optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsPotentialInsight, ReinforcementLearningOptimizationAction
]

instance OccupancyBasedRecommendationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dynamic workspace utilization insights for flexible design adjustments and lighting zone reconfiguration"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicWorkspaceUtilizationInsight, LightingZoneAdjustmentAction
]

instance ComplianceReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automatically generating sustainability reports including LEED certification metrics using DT-collected operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides LEEDMetricsReportInsight, AutomatedComplianceReportAction
]

instance StakeholderDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive visualizations for facility managers to monitor performance and building control engineers to debug systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagerDashboardInsight, EngineerDebuggingInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime interfaces and device configurations from BIM models to enable zero-touch provisioning of DT components"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationGenerationAction
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing BOREALIS-based adaptive control policies for lighting and HVAC systems using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlPolicyAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of energy consumption patterns across building zones for operational efficiency analysis"
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of occupancy trends enabling dynamic workspace utilization recommendations"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system identifying sensor failures and HVAC inefficiencies through pattern recognition"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations based on historical data analysis and anomaly detection"
]

instance EnergySavingsPotentialInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified potential for 15-20% energy savings through adaptive lighting and HVAC optimization"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of operational parameters using BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicWorkspaceUtilizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into current workspace utilization patterns for flexible design adjustments"
]

instance LightingZoneAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated reconfiguration of lighting zones based on occupancy patterns"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LEEDMetricsReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated calculation and reporting of LEED certification metrics using operational data"
]

instance AutomatedComplianceReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of sustainability compliance reports"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FacilityManagerDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard providing high-level building performance metrics for facility managers"
]

instance EngineerDebuggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Technical visualization tools enabling building control engineers to debug system anomalies"
]

instance DeviceConfigurationGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Model-driven generation of Ditto tenant configurations and Hono device mappings from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveControlPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control parameters using reinforcement learning algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including HVAC systems, lighting networks, and occupancy detection components"
    base:contains OccupancyPIRSensor, TemperatureSensor, HVACValveActuator, LightingActuator, ThermalCameraSensor, EnergyMeter
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting the runtime state of the digital twin including all models, services, and enablers"
    base:contains BIMCoreModel, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, BOREALISFramework
]

// C19: Components
instance LightingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building control system managing adaptive lighting through occupancy sensors and reinforcement learning controllers"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance HVACControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building control system regulating environmental conditions through valves, fans, and predictive maintenance algorithms"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DataIngestionLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standardized data ingestion pipeline using Eclipse Hono for raw sensor data collection and normalization"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance RuntimeManagementLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto-based runtime management system enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance VisualizationLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based visualization layer providing immersive 3D monitoring interfaces for stakeholders"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

// C1: SystemUnderStudy
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including HVAC systems, lighting networks, and occupancy detection components"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting the runtime state of the digital twin including all models, services, and enablers"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **bidirectional control commands** generated by the DT and executed on the physical system via **Eclipse Ditto**. The process includes:
  - **Control logic execution**: The DT processes real-time data (e.g., occupancy trends, energy usage) and generates **control signals** (e.g., adjust lighting levels, trigger HVAC adjustments) based on predefined policies (e.g., energy optimization rules from **BOREALIS**).
  - **Command dispatch**: Ditto routes these commands to **physical actuators** (e.g., lighting dimmers, HVAC valves) via **Eclipse Hono**, which ensures secure and authenticated communication.
  - **Feedback loop**: Actuator responses (e.g., confirmed adjustments) are relayed back to the DT for **real-time validation** and iterative optimization. The framework supports **declarative control policies** embedded in the BIM model, enabling automated commissioning and runtime adaptation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple time scales**, synchronized with the physical system’s operational rhythms:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Bidirectional data exchange occurs at **millisecond to second intervals** (e.g., sensor readings, actuator commands) via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, ensuring low-latency interaction.
  - **Iterative optimization**: Reinforcement learning policies (e.g., in **BOREALIS**) update control strategies at **hourly to daily intervals**, adapting to occupancy patterns and energy demands.
  - **Long-term analytics**: Historical data (e.g., energy trends, maintenance logs) is aggregated at **weekly to monthly intervals** for **life-cycle performance evaluation** and predictive maintenance. The framework supports **time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) for scalable storage and querying."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular system** with the following components:
  - **BIM Integration Layer**: Extracts and validates **device metadata** from the BIM model for Ditto/Hono configuration.
  - **Runtime Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Ditto** manages the DT’s **runtime state**, **control logic**, and **service orchestration**, while **Eclipse Hono** handles **data ingestion** and **authentication**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides **interactive 3D dashboards** for stakeholders, enabling **real-time monitoring** and **control**.
  - **Extensibility Layer**: Standardized **APIs and extension points** allow integration of **third-party services** (e.g., AI analytics, maintenance scheduling) without modifying core DT logic.
  - **Data Storage Layer**: **Time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) store **historical and real-time data** for analytics and reporting. The constellation supports **horizontal scaling** for large-scale deployments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building infrastructure, from **design to operation to refurbishment**:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **device metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) and **control logic** (e.g., TwinLight policies) for **as-designed** simulation.
  - **Construction phase**: The DT is **provisioned** via model-driven deployment, integrating **as-built** data (e.g., actual sensor placements) into the virtual model.
  - **Operation phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and energy optimization** using runtime data.
  - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **adaptive reconfiguration** of control systems (e.g., adding new sensors) and **performance benchmarking** against historical data. The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with legacy BIM models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: BIM models are **formally validated** (e.g., clash detection, semantic consistency) before deployment.
  - **Data Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enforce **real-time consistency** between PT and DT via **timestamped, authenticated data streams**.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The DT incorporates **probabilistic models** (e.g., sensor noise, environmental variability) for **predictive analytics**.
  - **Verification**: **ODTE metric** quantifies **entanglement** (e.g., 90%+ synchronization accuracy) between PT and DT states.
  - **Validation**: **Post-occupancy data** (e.g., energy savings, comfort metrics) validates DT-driven optimizations against real-world performance. The framework addresses **semantic drift** via **automated model updates** and **stakeholder reviews**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **standardized, protocol-agnostic connections** for PT-DT interaction:
  - **Data Ingestion**: Sensors communicate via **MQTT/HTTP** protocols to **Eclipse Hono**, which normalizes data into a **unified schema** (e.g., JSON-LD) before forwarding to Ditto.
  - **Command Dispatch**: Ditto routes control signals to actuators via **Eclipse Hono**, using **secure, authenticated channels** (e.g., TLS).
  - **Network Architecture**: The system follows a **service mesh pattern**, with **Ditto as the central orchestrator** and **Hono as the edge gateway**, enabling **low-latency, scalable communication**.
  - **Protocol Standards**: Compliance with **OPC UA**, **AMQP**, and **RESTful APIs** for interoperability with legacy systems. The framework supports **plug-and-play integration** of new sensors/actuators via **standardized device profiles**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using a **cloud-native, scalable architecture**:
  - **Middleware Hosting**: **Eclipse Ditto and Hono** are deployed as **containerized microservices** (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes) for **horizontal scaling**.
  - **Visualization Hosting**: **Unreal Engine 5** runs on **high-performance GPUs** (e.g., NVIDIA RTX) for **real-time rendering** of 3D dashboards.
  - **Data Storage**: **Time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) and **object storage** (e.g., S3) host **historical and real-time data**.
  - **Deployment Methodology**: **Model-driven deployment** automates the provisioning of Ditto tenants, Hono devices, and Unreal Engine assets from BIM models, ensuring **reproducible, scalable setups**.
  - **Infrastructure**: The system is deployed on **cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure) or **on-premise data centers**, with **disaster recovery** enabled via **replicated Ditto instances**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external systems via:
  - **Standardized APIs**: **RESTful and WebSocket interfaces** for **third-party analytics tools** (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) and **ERP/CRM systems**.
  - **IoT Platforms**: Integration with **AWS IoT, Google Cloud IoT**, or **Azure IoT Hub** for **scalable sensor management**.
  - **BIM Collaboration**: **IFC/BCF standards** for **seamless data exchange** with other BIM tools (e.g., Revit, Navisworks).
  - **Enterprise Systems**: **SOAP/XML APIs** for **ERP/HR systems** to correlate DT data with **occupancy schedules** and **maintenance logs**.
  - **Cross-Domain DTs**: **Federated DT architectures** enabling **interoperability** with other infrastructure DTs (e.g., smart grids, urban systems) via **Ditto’s multi-tenant capabilities**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed through:
  - **Tenant-Based Isolation**: **Eclipse Ditto** enforces **tenant-specific access controls**, ensuring **data isolation** between building owners, facility managers, and third-party service providers.
  - **GDPR Compliance**: **Anonymization of occupancy data** and **right-to-erasure mechanisms** for personal information.
  - **Role-Based Access**: **RBAC policies** restrict data access based on **stakeholder roles** (e.g., engineers vs. managers).
  - **Data Sovereignty**: **On-premise deployment options** for **sensitive infrastructure data**, with **encryption-at-rest** (e.g., AES-256) and **TLS 1.3** for data in transit.
  - **Audit Logs**: **Immutable logs** of all DT interactions (e.g., control commands, data access) for **compliance and forensic analysis**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards and frameworks**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** for **semantic interoperability** and **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for **collaboration**.
  - **IoT/OT Standards**: **OPC UA** for **industrial communication**, **MQTT** for **lightweight messaging**, and **AMQP** for **enterprise integration**.
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto** (based on **CPS-VAN**) and **Eclipse Hono** (based on **OMA LWM2M**) for **standardized DT management**.
  - **Visualization Standards**: **Unreal Engine 5** with **OpenXR** support for **cross-platform AR/VR integration**.
  - **Control Standards**: **Kafka** for **event streaming** and **RESTful APIs** for **service orchestration**.
  - **Lifecycle Standards**: **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Reference Architecture)** for **DT governance** and **ISO 55000 (Asset Management)** for **operational alignment**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Authentication**: **OAuth 2.0/JWT** for **user and device authentication** within Ditto/Hono.
  - **Authorization**: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** and **attribute-based encryption (ABE)** for **fine-grained permissions**.
  - **Data Integrity**: **Blockchain-based audit trails** (optional) for **tamper-proof logging** of DT interactions.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Fail-safe controls**: Ditto enforces **default-safe states** (e.g., emergency shutdowns) for actuators.
    - **Remote override safeguards**: **Multi-factor authentication (MFA)** required for critical commands (e.g., HVAC adjustments).
    - **Physical isolation**: **Air-gapped networks** for **safety-critical systems** (e.g., fire suppression).
  - **Compliance**: **IEC 62443 (Industrial Cybersecurity)** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **risk management** and **incident response planning**."
]
